query:
SELECT
                            r.rustdoc_status,
                            r.default_target,
                            r.doc_targets,
                            r.archive_storage,
                            cov.total_items,
                            b.id as build_id
                        FROM
                            crates as c
                            INNER JOIN releases AS r ON c.id = r.crate_id
                            INNER JOIN builds as b ON r.id = b.rid
                            LEFT OUTER JOIN doc_coverage AS cov ON r.id = cov.release_id
                        WHERE
                            c.name = $1 AND
                            r.version = $2
